title: RBI (Commercial Banks- Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Ninth Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended capital adequacy norms for commercial banks by prescribing a zero percent risk weight for specified ECLGS 5.0 exposures. The amendment recognizes the reduced credit risk associated with government-backed guarantees.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks- Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Ninth Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
